summary: Added a single opening bridge sentence to carry Chapter 8's examination aftermath directly into the dinner-and-research scene, preserving the lowered-guard progression before the drawing room appears. No closing rewrite was needed; the chapter already exits on separate departure and altered resonance in a way that hands off cleanly to the next-morning aftermath.
edits: Inserted an opening transition noting that neither Hermione nor Draco suggested ending the night after the examination, tightening the entry seam from Chapter 8.
